final:
module rnn_cell (
    input [3:0] x,      // 4-bit input
    input [3:0] h_prev, // 4-bit previous hidden state
    output reg [3:0] h_new // 4-bit output (new hidden state)
);
    always @(x, h_prev) begin
        h_new = (x + h_prev) % 16; // Simple addition and modulo operation
    end
endmodule
